specs.title: CSP frame-ancestors is delivered via HTTP header (not just meta)

error.message:

[2mexpect([22m[31mreceived[39m[2m).[22mtoBeTruthy[2m()[22m

Received: [31mnull[39m

error.snippet:
112 |         metaCsp?.[1] ?? null,
  113 |         'No CSP delivered (neither HTTP header nor meta tag). Add a strict CSP via response header.',
> 114 |       ).toBeTruthy();
      |         ^
  115 |       // If we reach here, CSP is meta-only. Warn but allow — frame-ancestors won't
  116 |       // work, but clickjacking protection via X-Frame-Options still applies.
  117 |       return;
